'''鈭歷-dh-j''' ('''vadhaja''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:monsterise|monsterise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-dh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:monsterise|monsterise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歷-dh-j
|-
! Lemma
| vadhaja
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:vadhajithi|vadhajithi]] || [[word:vadhajiji|vadhajiji]] || [[word:vadhajishi|vadhajishi]] || [[word:vadhaji|vadhaji]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadhajuthuth|vadhajuthuth]] || [[word:vadhajujuj|vadhajujuj]] || [[word:vadhajushush|vadhajushush]] || [[word:vadhaj|vadhaj]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadhajuthu|vadhajuthu]] || [[word:vadhajuju|vadhajuju]] || [[word:vadhajushu|vadhajushu]] || [[word:vadhaju|vadhaju]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadhajufuth|vadhajufuth]] || [[word:vadhajufuj|vadhajufuj]] || [[word:vadhajufush|vadhajufush]] || [[word:vadhajuf|vadhajuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vadhajethe|vadhajethe]] || [[word:vadhajeje|vadhajeje]] || [[word:vadhajeshe|vadhajeshe]] || [[word:vadhaje|vadhaje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadhajothoth|vadhajothoth]] || [[word:vadhajojoj|vadhajojoj]] || [[word:vadhajoshosh|vadhajoshosh]] || [[word:vadhaj|vadhaj]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadhajotho|vadhajotho]] || [[word:vadhajojo|vadhajojo]] || [[word:vadhajosho|vadhajosho]] || [[word:vadhajo|vadhajo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadhajofoth|vadhajofoth]] || [[word:vadhajofoj|vadhajofoj]] || [[word:vadhajofosh|vadhajofosh]] || [[word:vadhajof|vadhajof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:vadhaj忙th忙|vadhaj忙th忙]] || [[word:vadhaj忙j忙|vadhaj忙j忙]] || [[word:vadhaj忙sh忙|vadhaj忙sh忙]] || [[word:vadhaj忙|vadhaj忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vadhajathath|vadhajathath]] || [[word:vadhajajaj|vadhajajaj]] || [[word:vadhajashash|vadhajashash]] || [[word:vadhaj|vadhaj]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vadhajatha|vadhajatha]] || [[word:vadhajaja|vadhajaja]] || [[word:vadhajasha|vadhajasha]] || [[word:vadhaja|vadhaja]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vadhajafath|vadhajafath]] || [[word:vadhajafaj|vadhajafaj]] || [[word:vadhajafash|vadhajafash]] || [[word:vadhajaf|vadhajaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:vadhajasha|vadhajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:govadhajasha|govadhajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokivadhajasha|gokivadhajasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:vadhajn眉sha|vadhajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:govadhajnkn眉sha|govadhajnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokivadhajn眉sha|gokivadhajn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:vadhajsh毛sha|vadhajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:govadhajnksh毛sha|govadhajnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokivadhajsh毛sha|gokivadhajsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:vadhajrosha|vadhajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:govadhajnkrosha|govadhajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivadhajrosha|gokivadhajrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:vadhajmusha|vadhajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:govadhajnkmusha|govadhajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadhajmusha|gokivadhajmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:vadhajsherasha|vadhajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:govadhajnksherasha|govadhajnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokivadhajsherasha|gokivadhajsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:vadhajngasha|vadhajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:govadhajnkngasha|govadhajnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokivadhajngasha|gokivadhajngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:vadhajyasha|vadhajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:govadhajnkyasha|govadhajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokivadhajyasha|gokivadhajyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:vadhajyamasha|vadhajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:govadhajnkyamasha|govadhajnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokivadhajyamasha|gokivadhajyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:vadhajn眉sh毛sha|vadhajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:govadhajnkn眉sh毛sha|govadhajnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivadhajn眉sh毛sha|gokivadhajn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vadhajn眉rosha|vadhajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govadhajnkn眉rosha|govadhajnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivadhajn眉rosha|gokivadhajn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadhajn眉musha|vadhajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govadhajnkn眉musha|govadhajnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadhajn眉musha|gokivadhajn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:vadhajsh毛n眉sha|vadhajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:govadhajnksh毛n眉sha|govadhajnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivadhajsh毛n眉sha|gokivadhajsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vadhajsh毛rosha|vadhajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govadhajnksh毛rosha|govadhajnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivadhajsh毛rosha|gokivadhajsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadhajsh毛musha|vadhajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govadhajnksh毛musha|govadhajnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadhajsh毛musha|gokivadhajsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:vadhajron眉sha|vadhajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:govadhajnkron眉sha|govadhajnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivadhajron眉sha|gokivadhajron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:vadhajrosh毛sha|vadhajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:govadhajnkrosh毛sha|govadhajnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivadhajrosh毛sha|gokivadhajrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:vadhajromusha|vadhajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:govadhajnkromusha|govadhajnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokivadhajromusha|gokivadhajromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:vadhajmun眉sha|vadhajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:govadhajnkmun眉sha|govadhajnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokivadhajmun眉sha|gokivadhajmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:vadhajmush毛sha|vadhajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:govadhajnkmush毛sha|govadhajnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokivadhajmush毛sha|gokivadhajmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:vadhajmurosha|vadhajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:govadhajnkmurosha|govadhajnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokivadhajmurosha|gokivadhajmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:vadhaj|vadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:v忙dh忙j|v忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hovadhaj|hovadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hov忙dh忙j|hov忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohovadhaj|hohovadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohov忙dh忙j|hohov忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉vadhaj|n眉vadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉v忙dh忙j|n眉v忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉vadhaj|n眉n眉vadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉v忙dh忙j|n眉n眉v忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂vadhaj|n茂vadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂v忙dh忙j|n茂v忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂vadhaj|n茂n茂vadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂v忙dh忙j|n茂n茂v忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luvadhaj|luvadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luv忙dh忙j|luv忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluvadhaj|luluvadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluv忙dh忙j|luluv忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:livadhaj|livadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liv忙dh忙j|liv忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilivadhaj|lilivadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliv忙dh忙j|liliv忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kovadhaj|kovadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kov忙dh忙j|kov忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokovadhaj|kokovadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokov忙dh忙j|kokov忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kevadhaj|kevadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kev忙dh忙j|kev忙dh忙j]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekevadhaj|kekevadhaj]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekev忙dh忙j|kekev忙dh忙j]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|691fcb1}}
